_comment: Wiring guide: Form → Trigger → Automation → Workflow. This is the most common end-to-end pattern — a JSON form collects input, a manual trigger presents the form, the trigger fires an automation, and the automation runs a workflow.

step3_create_automation.note: Set componentId = workflow uuid (not _id), componentName = workflow name

step4_create_trigger.note: Set actionId = automationId, formId = formId, legacyWrapper = false

_lookup_helpers.workflow_uuid: GET /automation-studio/workflows?limit=100 → .items[] | {_id, name, uuid} → use uuid as componentId
